sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 72:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 72:1
items.html: Because this was their beginning when they were made in the first departure, where Keter is above everyone, and Malchut is in the end.
